homePage.title: Your AIPA Travel Companion
homePage.welcome: Welcome to AIPA - Your AIPA Travel Companion
homePage.description: Discover personalized travel itineraries, explore top destinations, and plan your perfect trip with AIPA. Start your adventure today!
homePage.middleBannerDescription: At AIPA, we believe strong relationships enhance our ability to serve you better. We are proud members of the Sri Lanka Association of Inbound Tour Operators (SLAITO) and hold accreditations from recognized travel industry authorities, ensuring that every journey you take with us is reliable, professional, and unforgettable.

nineArch.title: Into the Hills
nineArch.subtitle: Scenic train journeys
nineArch.description: Experience the iconic Nine Arch Bridge surrounded by lush greenery.

galle.title: Colonial Charm
galle.subtitle: Walk through history
galle.description: Discover the timeless beauty of Galle Fort and coastal heritage.

sigiriya.title: Ancient Wonders
sigiriya.subtitle: Climb the Lion Rock
sigiriya.description: Explore the majestic Sigiriya fortress and its ancient secrets.

bentota.title: Luxury Redefined
bentota.subtitle: Where nature meets elegance
bentota.description: Relax on golden beaches and experience the serenity of Bentota.

tea.title: Tea Country
tea.subtitle: Fresh from the hills
tea.description: Walk through Sri Lanka’s lush tea plantations and cool climates.

aboutUs.title: About AIPA
aboutUs.shortDescription:
AIPA is a premier travel agency in Sri Lanka, dedicated to providing exceptional travel experiences. Our purpose is to showcase the hidden gems of Sri Lanka, connecting travelers with the authentic beauty, culture, and unique experiences this island has to offer.

We are committed to delivering valuable services to our customers by combining our expertise, personalized guidance, and passion for travel. At AIPA, every journey is crafted to be memorable, seamless, and truly special.
aboutUs.leftService: Quote and update trips in minutes
aboutUs.rightService: Create journeys that your clients will never forget
